metadata.description: Sync-detected at module load: navigator.storage.getDirectory is callable. Read-only diagnostic; writing does not re-detect.
Sync-detected at module load: process.versions.node is set. Read-only diagnostic.
Active backend label: 'opfs' | 'node-fs' | 'none'. Picked at module load — OPFS wins if both probes pass. Read-only in Phase A; a future fs.bind fn will reconfigure.
Backend-relative root. '' for OPFS (origin root). './.plastron-fs' default for node-fs. Phase A: read-only descriptor of the active singleton.

metadata.name: fs.exists
metadata.description: Async. (path) → boolean. True if the path resolves to any entry under the root.

metadata.name: fs.read
metadata.description: Async. (path) → Uint8Array. Throws if missing or if the path is a directory.

metadata.name: fs.readText
metadata.description: Async. (path) → string. UTF-8 decode of the file's bytes.

metadata.name: fs.write
metadata.description: Async. (path, content) → void. content: Uint8Array | string. Overwrites in place; auto-creates missing parent dirs.

metadata.name: fs.writeText
metadata.description: Async. (path, content) → void. UTF-8 encodes string before write; auto-creates parent dirs.

metadata.name: fs.delete
metadata.description: Async. (path) → void. File only — use fs.rmdir for directories. No-op if missing.

metadata.name: fs.mkdir
metadata.description: Async. (path, recursive?) → void. Defaults recursive=true. No-op if the dir already exists.

metadata.name: fs.rmdir
metadata.description: Async. (path, recursive?) → void. Defaults recursive=true. No-op if missing.

metadata.name: fs.list
metadata.description: Async. (path) → string[]. Child names only (no slashes). Throws if path is not a directory.

metadata.name: fs.stat
metadata.description: Async. (path) → { size, isDir, mtime }. mtime is ms epoch; OPFS returns 0 for directories.

metadata.name: fs.rename
metadata.description: Async. (oldPath, newPath) → void. Files and directories. OPFS uses .move() with a read-write-delete fallback for older browsers.

zod.description: Raw file bytes. JSON Schema can't express Uint8Array natively; this schema's identity is the protocol set, not the zod fragment.

metadata.description: size protocol for file-binary. (v) → number. Returns v.length when v is Uint8Array, 0 otherwise.
isChanged protocol for file-binary. (oldV, newV) → boolean. Byte-by-byte compare; short-circuits on length mismatch.
mime protocol for file-binary. (v) → string. Returns 'application/octet-stream' — specialized schemas (file-image, file-doc-*) in Phase B override per type.
